LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DON RAMATICI INSURANCE, INC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD), PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD: (1)HOW DRI MISREPRESENTED ITS AUTHORITY; (2)HOW PLAINTIFFS (NOT FVI) HAVE SUFFERED HARM; AND (3)HOW THE MISREPRESENTATION WAS AUTHORIZED AND/OR RATIFIED BY DRI. AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD: (1)WHEN PLAINTIFFS HIRED COUNSEL AND BEGAN INCURRING FEES ON THE UNDERLYING LAWSUIT; (2)HOW/WHY A DUTY WAS OWED TO PLAINTIFFS; AND (3)WHETHER THEY ARE ASSERTING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND/OR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION. AS TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF 3RD PARTY BENEFICIARY CONTRACT), PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS WRITTEN OR ORAL. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DON RAMATICI INSURANCE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD), PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD: (1)HOW DRI MISREPRESENTED ITS AUTHORITY; (2)HOW PLAINTIFFS (NOT FVI) HAVE SUFFERED HARM; AND (3)HOW THE MISREPRESENTATION WAS AUTHORIZED AND/OR RATIFIED BY DRI. AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (NEGLIGENCE) PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD: (1)WHEN PLAINTIFFS HIRED COUNSEL AND BEGAN INCURRING FEES ON THE UNDERLYING LAWSUIT; (2)HOW/WHY A DUTY WAS OWED TO PLAINTIFFS; AND (3)WHETHER THEY ARE ASSERTING A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND/OR NEGLIGENT MISREPRESENTATION. AS TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF 3RD PARTY BENEFICIARY CONTRACT), PLAINTIFFS MUST PLEAD WHETHER THE CONTRACT WAS WRITTEN OR ORAL. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.)
